metadata.description: 可串行化: Highest level. Serial execution of transactions. No concurrency issues. Lowest performance. Python code example (to illustrate serial transaction execution): ```python def process_transaction(transaction): # Simulate a database operation print(f"Processing {transaction}...") # List of transactions to be processed transactions = ["Transaction1", "Transaction2", "Transaction3"] # Serial execution of transactions for transaction in transactions: process_transaction(transaction) ``` This example demonstrates serial execution, where each transaction is processed one after another without any concurrency.
